{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/696661?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/violetagg", "id": 696661, "login": "violetagg", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY5NjY2MQ==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/violetagg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44250", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Summary
An attacker can cause DoS by sending a crafted Redis payload with deeply nested arrays. This forces the server to allocate a massive number of state objects and collections, leading to memory exhaustion and an OutOfMemoryError.

### Details
io.netty.handler.codec.redis.RedisArrayAggregator aggregates RedisMessage parts into ArrayRedisMessage. It uses a `Deque<AggregateState>` to keep track of nested arrays. However, it does not limit the maximum depth of nested arrays. When an attacker sends a continuous stream of nested array headers (e.g., `*1\r\n*1\r\n*1\r\n...`), RedisArrayAggregator pushes a `new AggregateState` onto the stack and allocates a `new ArrayList` for each header. Because there is no depth limit, an attacker can send millions of such headers. This consumes a massive amount of heap memory for the AggregateState instances and their backing ArrayLists, eventually resulting in an OutOfMemoryError.

### Impact
Denial of Service due to memory exhaustion. Any application using Netty's RedisArrayAggregator to handle untrusted Redis traffic is vulnerable.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0038, "percentile": 0.30098}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T19:01:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44250"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-11T22:16:56Z", "published_at": "2026-06-08T19:01:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty/security/advisories/GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.1.135.Final", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.2.15.Final", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44250", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty/security-advisories/GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty", "summary": "Netty: Memory Exhaustion in RedisArrayAggregator due to Deeply Nested Arrays", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:27:12Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3244-j874-rhc2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.15.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-redis"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0.Final, <= 4.2.14.Final"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.135.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-redis"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.134.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Netty: Memory Exhaustion in RedisArrayAggregator due to Deeply Nested Arrays
